target: fj-core TensorValue I32 dense storage unlocks fj-lax i32 fast paths

profile_basis.source: ready bead frankenjax-a6fm7, filed by cc from rejected i32 compare debox attempt
profile_basis.finding: TensorValue::new(DType::I32, Vec<Literal::I64>) boxed i32 tensors, so as_i64_slice() was None and i32 missed dense i64-backed fast paths.

lever.description: Densify TensorValue::new(DType::I32, Vec<Literal::I64>) into the existing LiteralBuffer::I64 storage while preserving the TensorValue dtype tag as I32. Add explicit TensorValue::new_i32_values as the same storage contract.

isomorphism: Tensor dtype, shape, element count, and materialized Literal::I64 sequence are unchanged for I32 tensors.
Only backing storage changes from boxed LiteralBuffer::Literals to dense LiteralBuffer::I64 for all-I64 I32 tensors.
Existing fj-lax i32 arithmetic, reduction, and matmul code still uses the same i64 values, the same row-major iteration order, and the existing narrow_i32_tensor_result wrap chokepoint.
No floating-point arithmetic, RNG, ordering tie-break, or error-class surface is introduced.
tests: RCH vmi1227854: cargo test -j 1 -p fj-core i32_tensor_constructor_uses_dense_i64_storage -- --nocapture: passed, 1 test
RCH vmi1227854: cargo test -j 1 -p fj-lax i32 -- --nocapture: passed, 10 tests

validation: RCH vmi1227854: cargo check -j 1 -p fj-core -p fj-lax --all-targets: passed; pre-existing fj-lax dead_code warning remained.
RCH vmi1227854: cargo clippy -j 1 -p fj-core --all-targets -- -D warnings: passed.
ubs crates/fj-core/src/lib.rs: nonzero on pre-existing broad fj-core inventory; UBS fmt/check/clippy/test-build/audit/deny sections clean.

decision.reason: Production I32 literal-constructor path now reaches the existing dense i64-backed i32 matmul fast path, improving the scored same-worker row from 576.72ms to 12.903ms median.
decision.next_route: Reprofile after landing; likely follow-up targets are dense I32 compare/elementwise producer coverage and other i32 producers now that the storage contract is in place.
